# Flutter Interface Specifications

> Technical specifications for the Dart/Flutter API layer

**Status**: DRAFT  
**Type**: SDD (Spec-Driven Development)  
**Generated by**: /legacy analysis  
**Date**: 2026-03-04

---

## Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Flutter App Code                      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  FlutterDialer (public API - static methods)            │
│  ├─ isDefaultDialer()                                   │
│  ├─ setDefaultDialer()                                  │
│  └─ canSetDefaultDialer()                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  FlutterDialerPlatform (abstract interface)             │
│  └─ MethodChannelFlutterDialer (implementation)         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  MethodChannel ('flutter_dialer')                       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            │
                            ▼
              ┌─────────────────────────┐
              │   Android Plugin (Kotlin)│
              └─────────────────────────┘
```

---

## API Specification

### Class: FlutterDialer

**Location**: `lib/flutter_dialer.dart`

**Purpose**: Public API for Flutter dialer functionality

**Methods**:

```dart
class FlutterDialer {
  /// Check if this app is the default dialer
  /// 
  /// Returns:
  /// - true: if app is the default dialer
  /// - false: if app is not default OR error occurred
  static Future<bool> isDefaultDialer() async;

  /// Set this app as the default dialer
  /// 
  /// Opens system dialog for user confirmation.
  /// 
  /// Returns:
  /// - true: if system dialog opened successfully
  /// - false: if failed to open dialog OR error occurred
  static Future<bool> setDefaultDialer() async;

  /// Check if this app can be set as default dialer
  /// 
  /// Returns:
  /// - true: if app can be set as default (is not already)
  /// - false: if already default OR error occurred
  static Future<bool> canSetDefaultDialer() async;
}
```

---

### Class: FlutterDialerPlatform

**Location**: `lib/flutter_dialer_platform_interface.dart`

**Purpose**: Abstract interface for platform-specific implementations

**Inheritance**: Extends `PlatformInterface` (from `plugin_platform_interface` package)

**Structure**:

```dart
abstract class FlutterDialerPlatform extends PlatformInterface {
  // Constructor with token verification
  FlutterDialerPlatform() : super(token: _token);

  // Type safety token
  static final Object _token = Object();

  // Default instance (dependency injection point)
  static FlutterDialerPlatform _instance = MethodChannelFlutterDialer();

  // Getter for current instance
  static FlutterDialerPlatform get instance => _instance;

  // Setter with verification (for testing)
  static set instance(FlutterDialerPlatform instance) {
    PlatformInterface.verifyToken(instance, _token);
    _instance = instance;
  }

  // Abstract methods to be implemented
  Future<bool> isDefaultDialer();
  Future<bool> setDefaultDialer();
  Future<bool> canSetDefaultDialer();
  Future<String?> getPlatformVersion();
}
```

---

### Class: MethodChannelFlutterDialer

**Location**: `lib/flutter_dialer_method_channel.dart`

**Purpose**: Method channel implementation for Android communication

**Inheritance**: Extends `FlutterDialerPlatform`

**Channel**: `MethodChannel('flutter_dialer')`

**Implementation**:

```dart
class MethodChannelFlutterDialer extends FlutterDialerPlatform {
  @visibleForTesting
  final methodChannel = const MethodChannel('flutter_dialer');

  @override
  Future<bool> isDefaultDialer() async {
    try {
      final result = await methodChannel.invokeMethod<bool>('isDefaultDialer');
      return result ?? false;
    } on PlatformException catch (e) {
      print('FlutterDialer: PlatformException in isDefaultDialer: ${e.code} - ${e.message}');
      return false;
    } catch (e) {
      print('FlutterDialer: Exception in isDefaultDialer: $e');
      return false;
    }
  }

  @override
  Future<bool> setDefaultDialer() async {
    try {
      final result = await methodChannel.invokeMethod<bool>('setDefaultDialer');
      return result ?? false;
    } on PlatformException catch (e) {
      print('FlutterDialer: PlatformException in setDefaultDialer: ${e.code} - ${e.message}');
      return false;
    } catch (e) {
      print('FlutterDialer: Exception in setDefaultDialer: $e');
      return false;
    }
  }

  @override
  Future<bool> canSetDefaultDialer() async {
    try {
      final result = await methodChannel.invokeMethod<bool>('canSetDefaultDialer');
      return result ?? false;
    } on PlatformException catch (e) {
      print('FlutterDialer: PlatformException in canSetDefaultDialer: ${e.code} - ${e.message}');
      return false;
    } catch (e) {
      print('FlutterDialer: Exception in canSetDefaultDialer: $e');
      return false;
    }
  }

  @override
  Future<String?> getPlatformVersion() async {
    final version = await methodChannel.invokeMethod<String>('getPlatformVersion');
    return version;
  }
}
```

---

## Error Handling Specification

### Exception Types

1. **PlatformException**: Method channel communication errors
   - Invalid method name
   - Platform-side exceptions
   - Channel disconnection

2. **Generic Exception**: Any other unexpected errors

### Handling Pattern

```dart
try {
  // Method channel invocation
  final result = await methodChannel.invokeMethod<bool>('methodName');
  return result ?? false;
} on PlatformException catch (e) {
  print('FlutterDialer: PlatformException in methodName: ${e.code} - ${e.message}');
  return false;
} catch (e) {
  print('FlutterDialer: Exception in methodName: $e');
  return false;
}
```

### Logging Requirements

- Prefix: `FlutterDialer: `
- Include exception type
- Include method name
- Include exception details (code, message, or full exception)

---

## Method Channel Protocol

### Channel Name

```
flutter_dialer
```

### Methods

| Method Name | Parameters | Return Type | Description |
|-------------|------------|-------------|-------------|
| `isDefaultDialer` | none | `bool?` | Check default dialer status |
| `setDefaultDialer` | none | `bool?` | Set as default dialer |
| `canSetDefaultDialer` | none | `bool?` | Check if can set as default |
| `getPlatformVersion` | none | `String?` | Get platform version (template) |

### Null Handling

All method channel returns use null-coalescing:

```dart
return result ?? false;  // Default to false on null
```

---

## Testing Strategy

### Unit Testing

Use mock platform implementation:

```dart
class MockFlutterDialerPlatform extends FlutterDialerPlatform {
  bool _isDefault = false;
  
  @override
  Future<bool> isDefaultDialer() async => _isDefault;
  
  @override
  Future<bool> setDefaultDialer() async {
    _isDefault = true;
    return true;
  }
  
  @override
  Future<bool> canSetDefaultDialer() async => !_isDefault;
}

// In test:
FlutterDialerPlatform.instance = MockFlutterDialerPlatform();
```

### Test Cases Required

1. `isDefaultDialer()` returns true when app is default
2. `isDefaultDialer()` returns false when app is not default
3. `isDefaultDialer()` returns false on PlatformException
4. `setDefaultDialer()` returns true on success
5. `setDefaultDialer()` returns false on error
6. `canSetDefaultDialer()` returns true when not default
7. `canSetDefaultDialer()` returns false when already default
8. All methods log errors appropriately

- [ ] Add unit tests with mock implementation
- [ ] Verify null safety compliance

- [ ] Verify error handling coverage
